generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity environment hosting Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    base:contains PointCloudClusteringComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity environment"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity environment"
    base:contains UserInterfaceFEEnvironment
]

instance UserInterfaceFEEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Interface Functional Entity environment"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking software component"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance Actuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuation component converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]

instance LowerLevelChassisControl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower level chassis control managing steering and speed of the vehicle"
]

instance RawLiDARDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance RawLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance StructuredObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks data from DBSCAN clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance TranslatedStructuredObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Translated structured object tracks data after serialization and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model for raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filtering model for object trajectory tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for DBSCAN clustering of LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object trajectory tracking using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for GPU-accelerated processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for software development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for software development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks, alongside data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance to lead vehicle, and actuation commands offloading to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionOffloadingAction, SpeedCalculationOffloadingAction, ActuationCommandOffloadingAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speeds, and sending emergency braking commands via UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, SendEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data saving capability for monitoring reports"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Report generation capability for system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading lead vehicle detection computation to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCalculationOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading speed calculation based on distance to lead vehicle to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandOffloadingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloading actuation commands to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling Adaptive Cruise Control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disabling Adaptive Cruise Control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed parameter via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SendEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Motor Actuation and Steering Servo Actuation are generated by the ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE. The Data Translation component processes these commands through serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions. Communication between software components uses ROS2, and inter-entity communication uses UDP over Wi-Fi."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by industry standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific timing constraint."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system follows ISO 23247 RA architecture, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on distinct hardware, with coordination mechanisms including 100 ms clock synchronization for vehicular safety. The Physical Twin Entity extends beyond ISO 23247's OME by hosting resource-specific automotive functions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The network infrastructure uses ROS2 for internal software component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity transmission. The system enforces a maximum network latency of 100 ms, with each entity deployed on separate hardware components forming a distributed topology."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each Functional Entity (FE) is implemented as an individual ROS2 package and deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano hardware platforms, with each entity hosted on distinct hardware components to ensure dedicated resource allocation."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2:2021 Reference Architecture, which defines entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity; OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) is referenced as an implementation example for Data Collection and Device Control Entity to ensure interoperability."
]
